hooks.comment: Marketplace-dev hook. The plugin's hooks/hooks.json registers the same hook for consumers via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}; both paths are safe because the script is idempotent.

Marketplace-dev hook (dev-mirror of the plugin's hooks/hooks.json entry). Advisory: warns when an edit to a plugin agent file looks like the agent is instructing itself to spawn a sub-agent. Set RC_GUARD_RECURSIVE_SPAWN_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
Block obviously destructive commands that slipped past the deny list. Reads the tool call as JSON on stdin; exits 2 to block (exit 1 would not block).

Marketplace-dev hook. Command review (the Thing) — T3 panel tribunal. No-ops (fast grep) unless a category has `thing: on` in .ravenclaude/comfort-posture.yaml. The internal panel deadline (~75s) stays under this 90s hook timeout. The plugin's hooks/hooks.json registers the same script for consumers via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}; both paths are safe because the script is idempotent and short-circuits when no toggle is set.

Marketplace-dev hook (dev-mirror of the plugin's hooks/hooks.json entry). Runaway/rabbit-hole brake — portable replacement for native auto-mode's 3/20 brake. No-ops unless .ravenclaude/comfort-posture.yaml exists (this repo has none, so it no-ops); exits 2 when the agent thrashes (default 8 identical calls in a row) or blows a total-call ceiling (default 200). Deterministic, no model.
Layout enforcement: deny writes that don't match .repo-layout.json. Same script the plugin distributes to consumers.

Marketplace-dev hook. Decision-review enforcement (the Thing, decision mode). No-ops (fast grep) unless `decision_review: advisory|binding` is set in .ravenclaude/comfort-posture.yaml (default off; this repo has no such file so it no-ops). When opted in AND the AskUserQuestion is a single binary non-multiselect yes/no-shaped question, routes it through thing-decide.py and on a BINDING yes/no DENIES the prompt with the verdict so the agent proceeds without interrupting the user; defer/advisory/high-blast/error -> allow. Same script the plugin distributes to consumers via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}.

Marketplace-dev hook (dev-mirror). Definition-of-done gate: no-ops unless definition_of_done.cmd is set in .ravenclaude/comfort-posture.yaml (this repo has none, so it no-ops). When set + source changed, runs the gate command at Stop and blocks until it passes (self-limited to max_blocks). Closes the correctness/hallucination gap.
Remind the Team Lead to run the full test suite when source files changed. Advisory fallback when no definition_of_done.cmd is configured.

Marketplace-dev hook. Regenerates the comfort-posture project-layer rules from .ravenclaude/comfort-posture.yaml at session start. No-ops in this repo because it has no .ravenclaude/comfort-posture.yaml. The plugin's hooks/hooks.json registers the same script for consumers via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}; both paths are safe because the script is idempotent and no-ops when the posture file is absent.

Marketplace-dev hook. Warns when a session loads in acceptEdits/bypassPermissions mode, which bypasses the comfort-posture rules. The plugin's hooks/hooks.json registers the same hook for consumers via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}; both paths are safe because the script is advisory and idempotent.

Marketplace-dev hook. Injects a session-start capability banner (project surface + detected auth by env-var NAME only + effective settings.json permissions) via hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext. The plugin's hooks/hooks.json registers the same script for consumers via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}; both paths are safe because it is read-only, fail-silent, and emits nothing when there is nothing to report.
